summary: Iteration 164: HotelRunner v2 New Features - Write Readiness Score, Shadow Observation, and Transition Plan. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all new panels rendering correctly: Readiness Gauge (87.6/100), Transition Phase Bar (Shadow active), Observation Alerts, Observation History, and Collect Snapshot button.

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw keys (common.welcome, auth.signIn, etc.) - pre-existing issue from iteration 161

critical_code_review_comments: Write Readiness Score correctly calculates composite 0-100 score with 5 weighted components (drift 25%, error_rate 25%, retry 15%, dlq 15%, latency 20%)
Shadow Observation module properly collects daily snapshots with alert threshold evaluation
Transition Plan defines 4 phases (Shadow, Dry-Run, Limited Live, Full Live) with entry/exit/rollback criteria
ops-dashboard endpoint correctly aggregates readiness and transition data
Feature flags updated with dry_run_mode and limited_scope for transition phases
All new endpoints properly use tenant_id query parameter for multi-tenant support
Turkish language labels used throughout UI (Write Readiness Score, Dikkatli ilerleyin, Gunluk Snapshot Topla)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new UI components render and function correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing syroce_default tenant data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 164 verified all newly added HotelRunner v2 features. Backend endpoints tested: GET /readiness-score (returns overall_score, verdict, components breakdown), POST /observation/snapshot (collects daily metrics with alerts), GET /observation/history (returns snapshot history), GET /observation/report (returns daily report with trends), GET /observation/thresholds (returns alert threshold definitions), GET /transition/plan (returns 4 phases with entry/exit/rollback criteria), GET /transition/status (returns current phase + readiness), GET /transition/history (returns transition log), GET /ops-dashboard (now includes readiness and transition fields). Frontend at /hrv2-ops displays: Write Readiness Score gauge (87.6/100 with component breakdown), Transition Phase Bar (Shadow->Dry-Run->Limited->Full Live), Collect Snapshot button (Gunluk Snapshot Topla), Observation Alerts Panel, Observation History Panel. All data-testid attributes verified: readiness-gauge, readiness-score-panel, transition-phase-bar, transition-phase-panel, collect-snapshot-btn, observation-alerts-panel, observation-history-panel.

displays: Component breakdown (Drift, Hata Orani, Retry, DLQ, Latency)

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints backed by real HotelRunner API and MongoDB
